intro: A fast-paced arcade football game where legendary players clash in explosive matches powered by special abilities. No realism — just speed, skill, and pure competitive chaos.
description:
Beat the Champions is arcade football pushed to the extreme. Face legendary players in explosive matches full of rhythm, skill, and special abilities. Charge up and unleash your powers, control the pitch with precise movements, and make split-second decisions. Timing changes everything.

Outside the box, there are no fouls, creating constant action, riskier confrontations near the goal, and decisive moments that can change the match in an instant. Every game is dynamic and unpredictable, whether in quick matches or tournaments.

Plus, you can choose from historic Argentina National Team squads thanks to the official license of the Argentine Football Association (AFA). Score goals and make incredible plays with Messi, Maradona, Batistuta, and many other Albiceleste legends.

Beat the Champions is guaranteed fun for a World Cup year.


* Special Abilities System
* Argentina National Teams from all eras, officially licensed by AFA
* 100% Arcade Gameplay
* Dynamic and Intense Matches
* No fouls, except inside the box
* Local and Competitive Modes
* Experience the International Cup with 2026 atmosphere
